news.summary: Recently, a report was released stating that a total of 1,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the last 24 hours, bringing the cumulative number of cases to 50,000 in the country. Additionally, it was reported that there have been 20 new deaths due to the virus, with the total number of fatalities rising to 1,200. The government has urged the public to adhere to safety guidelines and precautions to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Germany's CDU leader Merz: I hope we can convince Americans that it's in their mutual interest to have good transatlantic relations
1MORE introduces 1MORE SonoFlow Mini HQ20 and SonoFlow SE HQ31 headphones, expanding product line for all generations.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on February 24, 2025, 1MORE unveiled new additions to their product line: the 1MORE SonoFlow Mini Hearing Protection Study Headphones HQ20 and the SonoFlow SE Over-Ear Headphones HQ31. These devices cater to different age groups and offer unique features.

news.headline: QurAlis to attend investor conferences in March. Biotech company focused on ALS treatments.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on February 24, 2025, QurAlis Corporation, a biotechnology company, is making strides as a clinical-stage entity. Their focus is on developing precise medications that could potentially change the course of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal diseases.

news.headline: NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS), the first U.S.-listed EV charging service company in China, to join investor conferences.
news.summary: In Beijing on February 24, 2025, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS) disclosed plans for their participation in investor conferences later that month. NaaS, the pioneer EV charging service company from the U.S. listed in China, will be represented. No particular details on the events were provided.

news.headline: Red Tree Builders-Alair Asheville's Green Haven wins Green Builder Media's 2025 Green Home of the Year Award.
news.summary: In Asheville, North Carolina on February 24, 2025, Red Tree Builders-Alair Asheville revealed that Green Haven, their newest high-performance home, received the 2025 Green Home of the Year Award in the General Excellence category from Green Builder Media. The award recognizes the home for its exceptional environmentally friendly features and design.

news.headline: Brighton Park Capital appoints Jeff Surges as Partner with 25 years of experience in healthcare technology.
news.summary: A firm specializing in investments in software and healthcare, Brighton Park Capital (BPC), headquartered in Greenwich, Connecticut, welcomed Jeff Surges as a Partner. With more than 25 years of expertise in the healthcare technology sector, Surges is renowned for his achievements in fostering growth and creativity. Notably, he previously held the position of CEO at RLDatix, a prominent provider of patient safety information. This move signifies BPC's strategic effort to capitalize on Surges' extensive experience to further drive innovation in their portfolio companies.

news.headline: Juniper Networks launches new AI-Native Routing innovations, offers enhanced automation and insights, leveraging Mist AI.
news.summary: In Sunnyvale, California, Juniper Networks (NYSE: JNPR) unveiled fresh innovations for its routing products to accelerate deployment and improve troubleshooting for large-scale networks. With Mist AI technology, known for AI-driven operations, Juniper's WAN routing solution now offers increased automation and visibility for comprehensive routing oversight and management. The latest enhancements to the Juniper Networks® AC platform aim to streamline operations and enhance control for users, keeping Juniper at the forefront of secure, AI-driven networking solutions.

news.headline: Domino's Pizza reports Q4 sales growth of 2.9% to $1.44B, missing estimate. Proposes 15% dividend hike. Global retail sales up 4.4%.
news.summary: Shares of Domino’s Pizza Inc. (NASDAQ:DPZ) dipped in premarket trading following the announcement of their fourth-quarter FY24 earnings. The company disclosed a 2.9% year-on-year sales increase, totaling $1.44 billion for the quarter. However, this figure fell short of the anticipated $1.48 billion as predicted by analysts. The rise in revenue was mainly driven by higher supply chain and U.S. franchise advertising revenues. The boost in supply chain revenue was a result of a 4.4% increase in food basket pricing to stores during Q4 2024 compared to the same period in 2023, along with increased order volumes. Additionally, global retail sales saw a 4.4% increase.

Global Neuromorphic Computing and Sensing Market from 2025-2035 analyzed with insights on 140+ companies shaping industry. Rapid growth driven by demand for energy-efficient AI processing. Segmented into hardware and sensing devices.

The market in this sector is witnessing swift expansion fueled by the rising requirement for energy-efficient AI processing and real-time sensor applications. It is presently divided into neuromorphic computing hardware comprising processors and memory systems, and neuromorphic sensing devices. The growth trajectory of this market is notably pronounced with substantial demand anticipated for these technologies in the coming decade.

news.headline: Ethena Labs raises $100M for new token launch. Founder Guy Young to introduce iUSDe for financial institutions in January.
news.summary: In January, Guy Young, founder of Ethena Labs, revealed intentions to launch iUSDe, a product tailored for regulated financial institutions.

Trip.com (NASDAQ:TCOM) to release Q4 earnings on Feb 24. Analysts predict $3.95 EPS, $12.32B revenue. Shares up 1.4%.
news.summary: Trip.com Group Limited (NASDAQ:TCOM) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on Feb. 24. Analysts predict earnings of $3.95 per share, lower than $4.00 per share last year. The company anticipates a quarterly revenue of $12.32 billion, up from $10.32 billion last year. Following Mr. Junjie He's resignation, Mr. Rong Luo of Baidu Inc. has been appointed as Trip.com's new director. Trip.com's shares closed at $67.02 on Friday, with a 1.4% increase. For further details, readers can refer to Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Top Wall Street forecasters adjust Zoom Communications price expectations ahead of Q4 earnings. Analysts predict $1.35 earnings per share and $1.19 billion in revenue for the quarter, up from $1.42 per share and $1.15 billion a year prior. Stock fell 1.1% to $82.50. More details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Zoom Communications Inc. (NASDAQ:ZM) is scheduled to announce its fourth-quarter financial results on Feb. 24, 2025, after the markets close. Analysts are predicting that the San Jose-based company will report earnings of $1.35 per share for the quarter, a decrease from $1.42 per share in the same period last year. Zoom is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $1.19 billion, up from $1.15 billion in the previous year. In its third-quarter report on Nov. 25, Zoom exceeded expectations with revenue of $1.18 billion, surpassing the estimated $1.16 billion. The company also reported adjusted earnings of $1.38 per share for the third quarter, beating analyst predictions of $1.31 per share. Following this news, Zoom shares closed at $82.50 on Friday, marking a 1.1% decline. Readers interested in discovering the most recent analyst ratings can find them on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

Apple plans to inject $500B in the U.S. despite looming tariffs; 20,000 jobs to be created with a Texas plant opening in 2026.
news.summary: An enormous investment worth billions of dollars has been promised by the company for the upcoming four years, with plans to generate 20,000 job opportunities. The scheduled opening of the new facility in Texas is anticipated to take place in 2026.

news.headline: Guizhou, China boasts most UNESCO Natural Heritage sites in the country, attracting global visitors with stunning landscapes.
news.summary: In Guiyang, China, as of February 24, 2025, Guizhou province holds the highest number of UNESCO World Natural Heritage sites in China. The province's stunning scenery, influenced by natural elements, attracts tourists globally who come to admire its beauty. With an impressive number of heritage sites, Guizhou remains a sought-after destination for travelers seeking to explore its captivating landscapes.

news.headline: EuroDry Ltd. reported Q4 2024 net revenues of $14.5M, $3.3M net loss, $4.8M Adjusted EBITDA, and $5.3M share repurchase, also signed newbuilding contracts worth $71.8M. In FY 2024, total net revenues were $61.1M with a net loss of $9.7M. Fleet consists of 13 vessels and 2 under construction. CEO anticipates market recovery in 2025. Earnings impacted by low charter rates and expenses adjustments. Reported gains on vessel sale and impairments.
news.summary: EuroDry Ltd. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2024. In Q4 2024, they had total net revenues of $14.5 million and a net loss of $3.3 million. Adjusted net loss was $0.7 million, excluding an impairment charge. They repurchased $5.3 million worth of shares. The company signed contracts for two new ultramax bulk carriers at $71.8 million. They also sold a vessel for demolition at $5 million. For the full year 2024, they had total net revenues of $61.1 million and a net loss of $9.7 million. Adjusted EBITDA totaled $12.4 million. The CEO expects a market recovery in 2025. EuroDry Ltd.'s fleet includes 13 vessels, with two under construction for delivery in 2027.

news.headline: Labcorp offers liquid biopsy test for advanced solid tumors, Plasma CompleteTM from blood draw. NYSE: LH.
news.summary: Labcorp® Plasma Complete™ is a newly launched genomic profiling solution for oncologists that offers high sensitivity and specificity. Through a simple blood draw, oncologists can access detailed genomic information. The service was announced on February 24, 2025, by Labcorp, a leading provider of laboratory services worldwide. Labcorp, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol LH, is known for its innovative and comprehensive approach in the medical field. This new offering is expected to provide valuable insights for physicians and researchers in the fight against cancer.

news.headline: EuroDry Ltd. reports 2024 year-end results in Athens, Greece with figures for three and twelve-month periods.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, EuroDry Ltd. (NASDAQ: EDRY) based in Athens, Greece, released its financial results for the three and twelve months ending December 31, 2024. EuroDry Ltd., a company that owns and operates drybulk vessels, disclosed its performance over both time frames.

news.summary: Gibraltar Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROCK), a prominent manufacturer in various markets such as residential, renewable energy, agtech, and infrastructure, disclosed that its Chairman and CEO, Bill Bosway, along with CFO Joe Lovechio, are set to speak at Gabelli Funds 35th Annual Pump, Valve, and Water Symposium on February 27, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. ET. They will also engage in investor meetings on the same day. This event marks an important opportunity for the company to connect with stakeholders.

news.headline: Portugal Court confirms Arbitration Award exceeding $1.1 billion against Venezuela by Gold Reserve Ltd. in recent ruling.
news.summary: Gold Reserve Ltd. has made significant progress regarding its arbitral award dated September 22, 2014, against Venezuela. The Lisbon Court of Appeal approved the Company's request to confirm the award on February 20, 2025, in Portugal. Gold Reserve Ltd. (TSX.V: GRZ) (OTCQX: GDRZF) is optimistic about this development in its efforts to enforce the Award which they have been pursuing against Venezuela.

news.headline: Pixelgen Tech launches Pixelgen Proxiome Kit for single-cell protein interactome analysis, Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: Pixelgen Technologies has introduced the innovative Pixelgen Proxiome Kit, which paves the way for a new omics dimension in single-cell analysis, focusing on protein interactomics. The groundbreaking technology was announced in Stockholm, Sweden and Marco Island, Florida on February 24, 2025. This kit enables researchers to delve into the dynamic protein interactome of individual cells. By offering this advanced tool, Pixelgen Technologies is revolutionizing the study of protein interactions in single cells.

news.headline: Redwire Corporation to launch Sentinel camera tech on Intuitive Machines' mission to Moon. Camera tech to be part of IM-2 mission.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW) disclosed that its Sentinel camera technology (SentinelCam), which has been successfully used in previous flights, will be sent aboard Athena, Intuitive Machines' Nova-C lunar lander. This will take place during IM-2, Intuitive Machines' second mission to the Moon. Redwire has provided Terrain Relative Navigation and Hazard Detection and Avoidance cameras from its Sentinel collection to be included in this mission. This collaboration highlights Redwire's dedication to advancing space infrastructure for the upcoming space economy.

news.headline: Strategy (Symbol: MSTR) completes $2B offering of 0% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030 to institutional buyers.
news.summary: Tysons Corner-based company Strategy™ (Nasdaq: MSTR) has successfully finalized the offering of its 0% convertible senior notes due 2030, known as the “notes.” The total principal amount of the notes sold in this offering reached $2 billion. The notes were specifically offered in a private sale to individuals perceived as qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. Strategy™ additionally granted.

news.headline: Global agriculture dealers market analysis predicts growth by 2025, focusing on equipment, precision technology, and input dealers.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Agriculture Dealers Market - A Global and Regional Analysis: Focus on Equipment, Precision Agriculture Technology, and Input Dealers" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The agriculture dealers market plays a crucial role in the agricultural supply chain by aiding in the distribution of various items like equipment, precision agriculture technologies, seeds, fertilizers, and crop protection chemicals. This market supports efficient distribution of these products globally.

news.headline: Red Cat Holdings announces Black Widow drone and FlightWave Edge 130 winners of Blue UAS Refresh, among 23 platforms.
news.summary: In San Juan, Puerto Rico, on February 24, 2025, Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT) revealed that its Black Widow drone and FlightWave Edge 130 were chosen as part of the Blue UAS Refresh initiative. This initiative selected 23 platforms and 14 distinct components and capabilities as winners. These selected platforms are set to undergo rigorous National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) verification and cyber security assessments. The primary objective is for these platforms to eventually join the Blue UAS List, catering to military, government, and commercial operations.

news.headline: Connexa Sports Technologies Inc. signs TikTok content deal for Middle East & North Africa. Subsidiary YYEM set to create & sell content.
news.summary: In Smyrna, Delaware, on February 24, 2025,  Connexa Sports Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: YYAI) has confirmed a significant development as previously hinted in a press release from January 2025. The majority-owned subsidiary of Connexa, Yuanyu Enterprise Management Limited (YYEM), has finalized an MCN (Multi-Channel Network) agency services contract. The deal is aimed at developing and distributing content specifically for TikTok, as part of a fresh vertical dedicated to social networking apps. This move marks a strategic step for YYEM to tap into the growing market of social media platforms.

news.headline: Houston American Energy Corp. (NYSE: HUSA) acquires Abundia Global Impact Group, aiming to expand into renewable fuels/chemicals industry.
news.summary: In Houston, Texas on February 24, 2025, Houston American Energy Corp. (NYSE American: HUSA) revealed the signing of a definitive agreement to purchase Abundia Global Impact Group, LLC ("AGIG"), a firm focused on transforming waste into lucrative fuels and chemicals. This move aligns with HUSA's goal to broaden its investments, grow its international presence, and implement an extensive strategy to enhance shareholder returns by pioneering advancements in renewable energy. The agreement is contingent upon approval from HUSA shareholders and meeting typical closing requirements.

news.headline: Werewolf Therapeutics appoints Anil Singhal, Ph.D., President of Trishula Therapeutics, to its board of directors on Feb 24, 2025. (Nasdaq: HOWL)
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in Watertown, Massachusetts, Werewolf Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HOWL), a leading biopharmaceutical company specializing in developing conditionally activated therapeutics to boost the immune system for cancer and immunological disease treatments, appointed Anil Singhal, Ph.D., the President and Chief Executive Officer of Trishula Therapeutics, to its board of directors.

news.headline: Algoma Steel Group (NASDAQ: ASTL; TSX: ASTL) to attend BMO 34th Global Metals, Mining & Minerals Conf. Presentation at ir.algoma.com.
news.summary: Algoma Steel Group Inc., a major Canadian steel producer, will be present at the BMO 34th Global Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals Conference from February 24 to February 26, 2025, in Hollywood, Florida. The company's presentation for the event can be accessed on its website at ir.algoma.com. Headquartered in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario, Algoma is listed on the NASDAQ (ASTL) and TSX (ASTL) stock exchanges. Specializing in hot and cold rolled steel sheet and plate products, Algoma is recognized for its industry-leading production.

news.headline: Anavex Life Sciences to present at 45th Annual TD Cowen Health Care Conference on March 3-5, 2025 in Boston, MA. CEO to speak.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Anavex Life Sciences Corp. disclosed plans to participate in the 45th Annual TD Cowen Health Care Conference happening from March 3-5, 2025. Anavex, listed as AVXL on Nasdaq, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical entity concentrating on pioneering treatments for various neurological disorders, such as Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, schizophrenia, and rare conditions like Rett syndrome. The presentation at the conference will be led by Christopher U Missling, PhD, the President & CEO, slated for Monday, March 3, 2025, at 9:50 AM (ET) within the premises of Boston Marriott Copley Place in Boston, MA.

news.headline: Bowman secures contract to provide 6-inch pixel digital orthoimagery for North Carolina's CGIA in Eastern Piedmont region.
news.summary: Bowman Consulting Group Ltd., a national engineering services firm traded on NASDAQ under BWMN, has secured a one-year contract with the State of North Carolina’s Center for Geographic Information and Analysis (CGIA). The contract entails providing high-resolution digital orthoimagery at a 6-inch pixel resolution for the counties of Bladen, Johnston, Sampson, Wayne, and Wilson in North Carolina's Eastern Piedmont region. This partnership will involve the production of orthorectified images.

news.headline: ADA price drops today due to Cardano onchain & technical factors; downward trend likely to continue for top-ten crypto.
news.summary: The current price of ADA has experienced a decline today. Various onchain and technical indicators related to Cardano indicate that the downward trend may continue for the top-ten cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Global Railroad Track Pan Market valued at USD 242.4 million in 2024, projected to reach USD 464.9 million with 6.1% CAGR by 2035. Major growth driven by railway network expansion and environmental protection standards. China's high-speed rail network expansion plan to 37,282 miles by 2035 creates substantial market opportunities. India's National Rail Plan 2024 allocating USD 750 billion through 2025 boosting demand significantly.
news.summary: The global Railroad Track Pan Market was worth USD 242.4 million in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 464.9 million by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 6.1%. Railroad track pans are containment systems that capture fluid spills from trains during maintenance and operations, playing a crucial role in environmental protection and regulatory compliance. The market is being driven by railway network expansion, modernization of facilities, and environmental protection standards. Investments in railway infrastructure and maintenance, cross-border rail connectivity, and high-speed rail networks are key growth factors. Developing economies like India, with significant rail infrastructure development plans, are contributing to market expansion. China's plan to expand its high-speed rail network presents significant market opportunities. Global rail network expansion and facility upgrades are expected to boost demand for advanced track pan systems, supporting sustained market growth.

news.headline: Aramark Collegiate Hospitality wins contract with Loyola Marymount Univ to provide food services starting May 2025.
news.summary: In Pennsylvania, Aramark Collegiate Hospitality has announced a partnership with Loyola Marymount University to become the new food services provider. This collaboration will bring a variety of fresh flavors and expanded options to the LMU community. Beginning in May 2025, Aramark will take over the management of all on-campus dining, retail, catering, and athletic concessions at the university. This move aligns with LMU's goal of enhancing the overall dining experience, and they are enthusiastic about the future with Aramark on board.

DecarbX and S4E TECH team up to save fuel costs in heavy industries, enhancing efficiency and safety. #carbonreduction
news.summary: A partnership between DecarbX and S4E TECH in West Palm Beach, Florida aims to reduce carbon emissions and increase efficiency in heavy industries. By collaborating, the companies plan to lower fuel expenses, enhance safety protocols, and automate processes. This joint effort is expected to have a significant impact on reducing carbon footprint and promoting sustainability. The project showcases a commitment to improving efficiency, safety, and environmental responsibility in the industrial sector.
